hero.title: 🚀 Assetain – Complete Startup Blueprint
hero.subtitle: A clean, structured, point-to-point plan for a universal asset-management SaaS platform that works for schools, hospitals, offices, and even whole countries.

overview.title: Asset Management for Anything & Everywhere
overview.subtitle: From schools to hospitals, offices to entire countries – Assetain lets anyone report, track, and fix physical assets with a single click.

about.title: 📖 What This Site Is About
paragraphs: This page is a blog-style overview of the Assetain platform. It explains the problem we solve, how the product works, the roles involved, and the roadmap we plan to follow.
Think of it as the "About" page for investors, partners, or future users who want a clear picture before the app itself is launched.

problem.title: ❓ The Problem
items: Assets (projectors, fans, water coolers, medical equipment…) break unexpectedly.
Reporting is manual: call the office, send an email, or write a request on paper.
Management struggles to know who is responsible, what the status is, and when it will be fixed.
Large organisations have dozens of locations; keeping track becomes chaotic.

solution.title: 💡 Our Solution
paragraphs: Assetain attaches a QR-code to every physical item. Anyone can scan the code (or manually type the asset ID), fill a short form describing the issue, and the system instantly creates a ticket.
The ticket is routed to the appropriate Supervisor / Manager, who assigns a Technician (plumber, electrician, IT-support, etc.). All updates are visible in real-time on a web dashboard.
The whole workflow lives in a single-page web app built with Tailwind CSS for a premium, responsive look.

items.title: QR-code reporting
items.desc: Scan or type an asset ID, fill a brief issue form.

items.title: Role-based dashboards
items.desc: Admin, Supervisor, Technician, Reporter each see only what they need.

items.title: Analytics (future)
items.desc: Failure frequency per asset, MTTR, heat-maps.

items.title: Multi-tenant ready
items.desc: Single-org MVP, later SaaS for many schools/hospitals.

items.title: Responsive design
items.desc: Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile browsers.

rows.permissions: Create users, assign roles, edit asset catalogue, view all tickets.
See tickets for their department, assign technicians, add notes.
Receive assigned tickets, update status, add resolution details.
Scan QR / enter ID, describe problem, view own ticket history.

roadmap.title: 🗺️ Roadmap
items: ✅ MVP – client-side app with localStorage persistence (already built).
🔜 Phase 1 – Lightweight Node/Express backend + JSON file storage for multi-device sync.
🔜 Phase 2 – Replace JSON with Firebase / Supabase for real-time multi-tenant SaaS.
🔜 Phase 3 – Integrate html5-qrcode for camera-based scanning.
🔜 Phase 4 – Secure authentication (email + password or OAuth) and role-based API.
🔜 Phase 5 – Analytics dashboard & reporting for administrators.

joinUs.title: 🤝 Join Us
joinUs.text: We are looking for early adopters, beta testers, and investors who share our vision of a fully managed physical-asset ecosystem.

coreConcept.title: 1️⃣ Core Concept & Brand Terminology
coreConcept.hierarchy:
[ Assetain ] (Main Platform)
     │
     └── [ Your Company ] (e.g., SMIT, Ali Electronics, Beaconhouse)
              │
              └── [ Branches / Locations ] (e.g., Karachi Campus, Campus B)
                       │
                       └── [ Assets with QR Codes ] (e.g., AC, Projector, Water Cooler)
coreConcept.terminology: We use the word Company because it feels professional and works for schools, hospitals, offices, and any organisation.

onboarding.title: 2️⃣ User Onboarding & Invitation Flow
steps: Account Creation (The Start): User clicks "Create Assetain" → creates a Company. The first registrant becomes the Owner (Super Admin).
Invitation System (Email-Based): Owner/Admin can send an invitation link via email. The invited user lands with zero permissions (Guest).
Permission Assignment: Until the Owner/Admin/Manager assigns a role, the new user sees a blank dashboard and cannot perform any actions.

rows.permissions: Full platform control, add/remove Admins, manage subscription, direct DB changes.
Full access to all branches, can invite Managers & Technicians, but cannot add/remove other Admins.
Manage assigned branches, assets, and review issue reports. Can invite Technicians.
View only tasks assigned to them, update status, add resolution notes.
Newly invited user with no permissions until a role is granted.

qrFlow.title: 4️⃣ QR Scan & Issue Reporting Flow
qrFlow.scanning: Anyone (visitor, student, employee) scans the QR code on an asset. No login required – the scan redirects to a simple web form.
qrFlow.optionsTitle: Issue Reporting Form – Options under review:
options: Option A (Super Simple): One-line text box describing the problem (e.g., "AC not cooling").
Option B (Rich & Detailed): Allows photo/video upload and optional contact number for location help.
qrFlow.routing: Upon submission, the ticket is instantly pushed to the relevant Branch Manager's dashboard as a notification.

resolution.title: 5️⃣ Technician Assignment & Resolution Workflow
steps: Selects an appropriate Technician (plumber, electrician, IT-guy, etc.) and assigns the task.
Technician receives a notification, fixes the asset, and marks the ticket Resolved.
Manager and Owner automatically receive an update that the issue is closed.

nextSteps.title: 🚀 Next Steps
nextSteps.text: We have the core blueprint. Tell us what you'd like to flesh out next – UI details, API design, branding, or a sprint plan.
